🌿 AI-Powered Intercropping

Grow More.
With Less.
Intelligently.

MultiSow uses stratified AI to design the perfect 4-layer intercropping system for your land — maximising yield, minimising resource waste.

3.5–4.2× Productivity70% Water Savings100% Compatibility
Design Your FarmOpen Designer

Four Layers. One Optimised Ecosystem.

Every vertical tier is managed by a dedicated AI model that learns the physics of light, soil, and roots.

CANOPY LAYER • 15–25m

Overstory Capture

Coconut, Teak, Silver Oak intercept 52% of sunlight via Beer-Lambert law modelling.

PAR Absorption52%
k = 0.52 • LAI = 4.8
▼
MIDDLE TIER • 5–10m

Shade-Adapted Growth

Banana, Cocoa, and Coffee thrive at 40–60% transmitted light. FOHEM optimises spacing to hit the target.

Light Transmission38%
Transmitted PAR: 38%
▼
UNDERSTORY • 0.5–2m

Diffuse Light Specialists

Ginger, Turmeric and Yams absorb diffuse sky radiation. Root geometry is optimised to avoid competition.

Diffuse Light18%
Diffuse fraction: 0.42
▼
ROOT ZONE • 0–120cm

Underground Resource Map

Root Architecture Modelling calculates species overlap (ROI). Nutrient placement is automated to eliminate competition.

ROIROI: 0.28 — Low
N: 142mg/kg

Powered by FOHEM

Fuzzy-Optimized Hybrid Ensemble Model — four AI engines working in concert.

Fuzzy Inference

28 agricultural IF-THEN rules encode expert knowledge. Handles uncertainty in sparse field data with confidence.

48 Rules Encoded

Random Forest

500 decision trees learn non-linear interactions between soil, climate, and management variables.

500 Trees

CatBoost Ensemble

Natively handles categorical farm data — soil types, crop varieties, and Indian regional profiles.

1000 Iterations

Genetic Optimizer

Evolves optimal blending weights across all models every season. Adapts to your farm's unique microclimate.

50 Generations

Current Season Weight Distribution

FIS: 28%
RF: 31%
CatBoost: 26%
ELM: 15%

0.0×

Average Land Equivalent Ratio

0%

Water Use Reduction

₹0.0L

Avg Monthly Revenue per Acre

0%

Compatibility Accuracy

How It Works

Three steps from field to optimised harvest.

STEP 1

Design Your Strata

Select your land size, soil type, and target crops. MultiSow's AI immediately validates compatibility across all 4 vertical tiers.

STEP 2

AI Optimises Everything

FOHEM analyses 200+ features — from Beer's Law light interception to root overlap indices — and finds the optimal planting geometry.

STEP 3

Track & Improve

Connect IoT sensors and drone imagery. The model retrains on your real farm data every season, getting smarter with every harvest.

Pre-Built for Indian Agriculture

AI You Can Actually Understand

Every recommendation comes with a plain-English explanation powered by SHAP and LIME.

Canopy Yield — Top Feature Contributions

Leaf Area Index (LAI)
+0.48
30-day Solar Radiation
+0.31
Row Spacing (3.5m)
+0.22
Soil Nitrogen
+0.18
Root Overlap Index
−0.14
VWC (Soil Moisture)
−0.09

Why is yield predicted at 2.8 t/ha?

🌿

Your canopy LAI of 4.8 is optimal, capturing maximum solar radiation without over-shading lower tiers.

☀️

30-day average solar radiation is 15% above baseline — ideal conditions for coconut fruit development.

📏

Row spacing of 3.5m allows sufficient light penetration to your middle tier banana plants.

⚠️

Root overlap with understory (ROI: 0.32) is creating mild nitrogen competition. Consider deep-band N placement.

Explanation Language

Built on peer-reviewed agricultural science.

📊ICRISAT Datasets🛰️NASA POWER API🌍Sentinel-2 Imagery📚ICAR Research

Validated on 480+ plot-years of Indian intercropping data.

Join farmers across Kerala, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh and Maharashtra who are growing smarter with AI-guided intercropping.

No account needed. Free for farms up to 2 acres.
